name: North India Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi – Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer
itinerary.description: Delhi – Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today after breakfast visit Old & New Delhi visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, Rajghat
itinerary.description: Today after breakfast visit Old & New Delhi visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, Rajghat (Gandhi Cremation place),India Gate, President House, Parliament, Qutub Minar, Lotus Temple, Humayun’s Tomb. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra – Today after breakfast, proceed to Agra and Visit Memory of Love Taj Mahal
itinerary.description: Agra – Today after breakfast, proceed to Agra and Visit Memory of Love Taj Mahal (First wonder of the world)After visiting Agra Fort. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra To Jaipur ,Today after breakfast proceed to Jaipur on the way to visit Fate
itinerary.description: Agra To Jaipur ,Today after breakfast proceed to Jaipur on the way to visit Fatehpur Sikri. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur, Today after breakfast, I will proceed to visit the ancient capital of Am
itinerary.description: Jaipur, Today after breakfast, I will proceed to visit the ancient capital of Amber. Visit beautiful Amber Fort. After Amber Fort proceeds to the pink city Jaipur we will visit Hawa Mahal(Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar) after visiting famous block printing & James & Stone cutting factory work being done for centuries in Jaipur. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Delhi, Today after breakfast, proceed to Delhi and drop you at the Air
itinerary.description:
Jaipur to Delhi, Today after breakfast, proceed to Delhi and drop you at the Airport with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj mahal closed on every friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation .
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Breakfast/Dinner
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel, State taxes
Comfortable vehicle with experienced driver
Guide Services
Exclusions
Meals other than those specified above
